title: Claude Code Live Session Registry
description: Schema for ~/.claude/sessions/<pid>.json — live heartbeat files for running Claude Code sessions.

pid.description: OS process ID of the Claude Code session.

sessionId.description: UUID identifying this session. Matches the JSONL filename in projects/.

cwd.description: Working directory the session was started in.

startedAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the session started.

peerProtocol.description: IPC protocol version for peer communication.

kind.description: Whether the session is interactive or a background agent.

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of last status update.
